ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the reinforcement learning algorithm used */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Name of the environment in which the algorithm was trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "ep_len_mean" REAL /* Mean episode length */,
  "ep_rew_mean" REAL /* Mean episode reward */,
  "n_updates" INTEGER /* Number of updates */,
  "ent_coef_loss" REAL /* Entropy coefficient loss */,
  "actor_loss" REAL /* Actor loss */,
  "critic_loss" REAL /* Critic loss */,
  "ent_coef" REAL /* Entropy coefficient */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "fps" INTEGER /* Frames per second */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total timesteps */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Elapsed time */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes */,
  "timesteps_per_episode" REAL /* Average number of timesteps per episode */,
  "reward_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of episode rewards */,
  "loss_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of losses */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or link to the original paper or documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or link to the environment documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the user's session access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the report was modified */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
